ValidationRule.description: Rest Break time should not be prior to Start Time.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( OR(ISNEW(), ISCHANGED( Start_Date_Time__c )), Driver_Assignment__r.Start_Date_Time__c > Start_Date_Time__c, ISPICKVAL( Time_Entry_Type__c , 'Rest Break') )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Rest Break time should not be prior to Start Time.
